remaining_risks.description: Three-way divergence in branch-protection documentation (required-checks.yml, branch-protection-config.yml, branch-protection-rules.md)

remaining_risks.description: release-ga.yml (minimal bypass) still triggers on GA tags and could race release-ga-pipeline.yml publish step
remaining_risks.action: Consider removing push:tags trigger from release-ga.yml once release-ga-pipeline.yml is confirmed stable
